popularStory.headline: Roger II (22 December 1095-26 February 1154)
popularStory.description: Roger II (22 December 1095-26 February 1154) was King of Sicily, son of Roger I of Sicily and successor to his brother Simon. He began his rule as Count of Sicily in 1105, became Duke of Apulia and Ca …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger II de Sicile Roi de Sicile於1095年12月22日出生在義大利卡拉布里亞維波 瓦倫亞米列托時，他的父親Roger I de HAUTEVILLE Comte de SICILE64歲，母親Adelasia del Vasto Comtesse consort de Sicile et Reine de Jérusalem25歲。他於1117年與Elvira de Castile Queen of Sicily結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1154年2月26日在義大利西西利亞巴勒莫享年58歲，埋葬在義大利西西利亞巴勒莫巴勒莫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger II de Sicile Roi de Sicile于1095年12月22日出生在意大利卡拉布里亞維波 瓦倫亞米列托时，他的父亲Roger I de HAUTEVILLE Comte de SICILE64岁，母亲Adelasia del Vasto Comtesse consort de Sicile et Reine de Jérusalem25岁。他于1117年与Elvira de Castile Queen of Sicily结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1154年2月26日在意大利西西利亞巴勒莫享年58岁，埋葬在意大利西西利亞巴勒莫巴勒莫。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sicile
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Sickel
meanings: North German: nickname from Middle Low German sickel ‘kid, young goat’.
Americanized form of German   Seckel  . Compare   Van Sickel   2.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger II de Sicile Roi de Sicile was born on 22 December 1095, in Mileto, Vibo Valentia, Calabria, Italy, his father, Roger I de HAUTEVILLE Comte de SICILE, was 64 and his mother, Adelasia del Vasto Comtesse consort de Sicile et Reine de Jérusalem, was 25. He married Elvira de Castile Queen of Sicily in 1117. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 26 February 1154, in Palermo, Sicily, Italy, at the age of 58, and was buried in Palermo, Palermo, Sicily, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger II de Sicile Roi de Sicile est né le 22 décembre 1095, à Mileto, Vibo Valentia, Calabria, Italie, son père, Roger I de HAUTEVILLE Comte de SICILE, avait 64 ans et sa mère, Adelasia del Vasto Comtesse consort de Sicile et Reine de Jérusalem, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Elvira de Castile Queen of Sicily en 1117. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 26 février 1154, à Palermo, Sicile, Italie, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Palermo, Palermo, Sicile, Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger II de Sicile Roi de Sicile am 22. Dezember 1095 in Mileto, Vibo Valentia, Calabria, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger I de HAUTEVILLE Comte de SICILE 64 und seine Mutter Adelasia del Vasto Comtesse consort de Sicile et Reine de Jérusalem 25. Er hat 1117 Elvira de Castile Queen of Sicily geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 26. Februar 1154 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Palermo, Sizilien, Italien und wurde in Palermo, Palermo, Sizilien, Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger II de Sicile Roi de Sicile è nato il il 22 dicembre 1095 nel Mileto, Vibo Valentia, Calabria, Italia, il suo padre, Roger I de HAUTEVILLE Comte de SICILE, aveva 64 anni e il suo madre, Adelasia del Vasto Comtesse consort de Sicile et Reine de Jérusalem, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Elvira de Castile Queen of Sicily nel 1117. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 26 febbraio 1154, nel Palermo, Sicilia, Italia, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Palermo, Palermo, Sicilia, Italia.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger II de Sicile Roi de Sicileが1095年12月22日にイタリアカラブリアヴィボ ベレンティアミレトーで生まれた時，父Roger I de HAUTEVILLE Comte de SICILEは64歳，母Adelasia del Vasto Comtesse consort de Sicile et Reine de Jérusalemは25歳であった。1117年にElvira de Castile Queen of Sicilyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1154年2月26日にイタリアシシリアプアラーモで58歳で死去し，イタリアシシリアプアラーモプアラーモにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger II de Sicile Roi de Sicile(이)가 1095년 12월 22일 이탈리아 캘라브리아 비보 발티아 마일레토에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger I de HAUTEVILLE Comte de SICILE(은)는 64세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelasia del Vasto Comtesse consort de Sicile et Reine de Jérusalem(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1117년 Elvira de Castile Queen of Sicily(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1154년 2월 26일 이탈리아 시실리야 파일모에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 시실리야 파일모 파일모에 묻혔다.

mn.22 December 1095–26 February 1154: 1095 оны Арванхоёрдугаар сарын 22–1154 оны Хоёрдугаар сарын 26

pt.22 December 1095–26 February 1154: 22 de dezembro de 1095–26 de fevereiro de 1154
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger II de Sicile Roi de Sicile nasceu em 22 de dezembro de 1095, em Mileto, Vibo Valentia, Calabria, Itália, seu pai, Roger I de HAUTEVILLE Comte de SICILE, tinha 64 anos e sua mãe, Adelasia del Vasto Comtesse consort de Sicile et Reine de Jérusalem, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Elvira de Castile Queen of Sicily em 1117. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 26 de fevereiro de 1154, em Palermo, Sicilia, Itália, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Palermo, Palermo, Sicilia, Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger II de Sicile Roi de Sicile родился 22 декабря 1095 г. в местности милето, вибо веилентя, калабря, Италия, его отцу по имени Roger I de HAUTEVILLE Comte de SICILE было 64 года, а матери, которую звали Adelasia del Vasto Comtesse consort de Sicile et Reine de Jérusalem, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Elvira de Castile Queen of Sicily в 1117 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 26 февраля 1154 г. в местности пеилирмо, сисиля, Италия в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности пеилирмо, пеилирмо, сисиля, Италия.

sm.from 1130 to 1154: mai le 1130 e o'o I le 1154

es.22 December 1095–26 February 1154: 22 de diciembre de 1095–26 de febrero de 1154
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger II de Sicile Roi de Sicile nació el 22 de diciembre de 1095, en Mileto, Vibo Valentia, Calabria, Italia, su papá, Roger I de HAUTEVILLE Comte de SICILE, tenía 64 años y su mamá, Adelasia del Vasto Comtesse consort de Sicile et Reine de Jérusalem, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Elvira de Castile Queen of Sicily en 1117. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 26 de febrero de 1154, en Palermo, Sicilia, Italia, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Palermo, Palermo, Sicilia, Italia.
